'''Weerden''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="SWS" /> located within the [[Weerden system/Legends|Weerden system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], near [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was here that an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] killed [[Grand Inquisitor/Legends|Grand Inquisitor]] [[Laddinare Torbin]] by crashing his [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], ''[[Sark-I]]'' into [[Imperial palace (Weerden)|Torbin's palace]].<ref name="SWS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}}
